query_normalized: llmxive follow-up: extending "locateanything: fast and high-quality vision-language grounding with p" computer science
rationale: This paper satisfies criteria (a) and (b) as it directly measures the same core mechanism (semantic grounding in vision-language models) and evaluates the same dependent variable (grounding quality/accuracy) that the user's question references via the "LocateAnything" system. Even though it focuses on evaluation and enhancement rather than the specific "P" algorithm mentioned in the user's title, it provides the canonical empirical baseline and domain-specific evidence required for a literature
